checks: Graphify routed the phase through tutorBook, RevisionView/AppDesignLanguagePage, chapterAudioOverviews, userBrainArchitectureBook, README, and audio overview plan tests
Expanded the remaining 13 Tutor System Architecture and 4 App Design Language transcripts into long-form, plain-language stored audio explainers
Deepgram generation passed for --book tutor-book and --book app-design-language with checked-in MP3 outputs
ffprobe measured all 25 built-in chapter guide durations in range: Tutor System Architecture 220-240 seconds, User Brain Architecture 193-214 seconds, and App Design Language 233-235 seconds
npm run audio:overview:dry-run passed with 25 present, 0 missing, 25 planned

Headless Chrome QA confirmed Tutor System Architecture and App Design Language chapter 1 audio cards at 390x844 and 1440x900 with native controls, transcripts, 226/233-second loaded durations, no raw stored metadata in-card, and no horizontal overflow
Browser QA saved mobile screenshots to .workflow/brain-architecture-implementation-program/results/phase34-tutor-audio-mobile.png and phase34-app-design-audio-mobile.png
graphify update . --force passed with no topology changes after this documentation/audio-manifest slice
Temporary headless Chrome QA and local dev server were used only for verification
